ast.name: setButtonText
ast.target: 创建文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The full file path to the other vault root folder.
ast.target: 其他库根文件夹的完整文件路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The full file path to the directory containing all vaults.
ast.target: 包含所有库的目录的完整文件路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If set to true, the folder structure of the original file will be recreated in the new vault.
ast.target: 如果设置为 true，将在新库中重新创建原始文件的文件夹结构。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If set to true, the original file will be deleted.
ast.target: 如果设置为 true，将删除原始文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add a link to the new file in the new vault to the current note. If set to false, the file will be left unchanged.
ast.target: 在当前笔记中添加指向新库中新文件的链接。如果设置为 false，文件将保持不变。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add a tag to be assigned automatically to the original note after transfer (without `#`)
ast.target: 添加一个标签，在传输后自动分配给原始笔记（不含 `#`）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If set to false, the file will be skipped if it already exists in the other vault.
ast.target: 如果设为 false，且文件已存在于其他库中，将跳过该文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The folder will use the output vault as root
ast.target: 该文件夹将使用输出库作为根目录
